name.errorMessage: Name must be at least 2 characters and contain no numbers

email.errorMessage: Please enter a valid email address

phone.errorMessage: Phone must be 10 digits starting with 6, 7, 8, or 9

interviewStatus.errorMessage: Submission blocked: Interview status is Rejected

offerLetter.errorMessage: Offer letter can only be issued if interview is Cleared

age.warningMessage: Candidate age is outside the 18-35 range. Exception required.

graduationYear.warningMessage: Graduation year must be between 2015 and 2025. Exception required.

percentage.warningMessage: Percentage below 60% (or CGPA below 6.0). Exception required.

screeningScore.warningMessage: Screening score below minimum (40/100). Exception required.

exceptionRules.flagMessage: FLAGGED FOR MANAGER REVIEW: This submission has 3+ exceptions and requires manager approval before processing.
